summary: Solid 90's Dead performance with standout Sugaree, Scarlet‑fire sequence and a smoking Dark Star > ... > The Other One; recording quality is decent but not described.
review: Both reviewers found the show solid, highlighting Sugaree, the Scarlet‑fire transition and an impressive Dark Star > … > The Other One segment. No specific comments on the source or mix were made, suggesting a generally acceptable recording that lets the strong playing shine through.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (4‑ and 5‑star) praise several songs and overall performance; lack of recording details keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks on soundboard, audience bleed, or clarity; reviewers' positive tone implies an acceptable listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note the entire set is solid, with the highlighted numbers standing out while the remainder is described as at least on‑par.
